title: Presigned Downloads, CloudFront Signatures, Cookies, and Revocation · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs presigned downloads, cloudfront signatures, cookies, and revocation from browser, Go service, S3, CloudFront, security, billing, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for time-bounded signed-delivery decision record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Presign the exact version, response metadata, method, region, credential scope, and shortest useful expiry while treating the URL as a bearer secret.
Choose signed URL or signed cookie by object count, path scope, player behavior, client constraints, and leakage surface.
Choose canned or custom CloudFront policy and constrain expiry, optional start time, resource wildcard, and IP range without accidental overbreadth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review S3 Presigned Download
steps.instruction:
Order the S3 Presigned Download S3, CloudFront, and Go storage-delivery evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review S3 Presigned Download.
steps.why: Correct order keeps S3 Presigned Download assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review S3 Presigned Download, keep S3 Presigned Download connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

content.text: A review Go file-delivery team handles case 9749 during a private media release. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound signed access by time, resource, key group, and explicit SHA-256 review; cap bytes, time, attempts, concurrency, and spend before starting work; then change cache and retrieval cost assumptions and defend the new budget result. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Presign the exact version, response metadata, method, region, credential scope, and shortest useful expiry while treating the URL as a bearer secret.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so S3 Presigned Download has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Presign the exact version, response metadata, method, region, credential scope, and shortest useful expiry while treating the URL as a bearer secret.

For S3, CloudFront, and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review S3 Presigned Download, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: A presigned S3 URL has permissions independent from the signing principal.

options.text: Declare S3, CloudFront, and Go stakeholder outcome, file and object identity, owner, state, and byte, time, concurrency, cache, and cost budgets for the review S3 Presigned Download case
Predict S3, CloudFront, and Go authorization, custody, transfer, integrity, cache, failure, cancellation, cleanup, rollback, and recovery outcomes for the review S3 Presigned Download case
Run the smallest deterministic S3, CloudFront, and Go storage decision model and retain inspectable changed-case evidence for the review S3 Presigned Download case
Inject one changed S3, CloudFront, and Go failure, verify bounded cleanup and recovery, and state controlled AWS transfer limits for the review S3 Presigned Download case
